title: Section 110
content: A general court-martial may be convened by the Central Government or 1[the Chief of the Air Staff] or by any officer empowered in this behalf by warrant of1[the Chief of the Air Staff].
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 19 of 1955, s. 2 and the Schedule, for "the Commander-in-Chief", (w.e.f. 7-5-1955).
